xwikidoc.name: WebHome
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.title: $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.title")
xwikidoc.content:
{{velocity}} $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.desc") #set($currentUserRef = $xcontext.userReference) #set($inputError = false) #set($safeAppName = $!request.appname) #set($safeClassName = $!request.className) #set($safeProperty = $!request.property) #set($safeType = $!request.type) #set($safeFunction = $!request.function) #set($safeAggregate = $!request.aggregate) #set($safeAggregateFunction = $!request.aggregateFunction) #set($safeOrderDirection = $!request.orderDirection) #if(!$safeType || $safeType=="") #set($safeType = "pie") #end #if(!$inputError && $safeAppName && $safeAppName!="") #set($sanitizedValue = $safeAppName.replace('"', '').replace("'", "")) #if($sanitizedValue != $safeAppName) #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.invalidQuotes")) #else #set($safeAppName = $sanitizedValue) #end #end #if(!$inputError && $safeClassName && $safeClassName!="") #set($sanitizedValue = $safeClassName.replace('"', '').replace("'", "")) #if($sanitizedValue != $safeClassName) #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.invalidQuotes")) #else #set($safeClassName = $sanitizedValue) #end #end #if(!$inputError && $safeProperty && $safeProperty!="") #set($sanitizedValue = $safeProperty.replace('"', '').replace("'", "")) #if($sanitizedValue != $safeProperty) #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.invalidQuotes")) #else #set($safeProperty = $sanitizedValue) #end #end #if(!$inputError && $safeType && $safeType!="") #set($sanitizedValue = $safeType.replace('"', '').replace("'", "")) #if($sanitizedValue != $safeType) #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.invalidQuotes")) #else #set($safeType = $sanitizedValue) #end #end #if(!$inputError && $safeFunction && $safeFunction!="") #set($sanitizedValue = $safeFunction.replace('"', '').replace("'", "")) #if($sanitizedValue != $safeFunction) #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.invalidQuotes")) #else #set($safeFunction = $sanitizedValue) #end #end #if(!$inputError && $safeAggregate && $safeAggregate!="") #set($sanitizedValue = $safeAggregate.replace('"', '').replace("'", "")) #if($sanitizedValue != $safeAggregate) #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.invalidQuotes")) #else #set($safeAggregate = $sanitizedValue) #end #end #if(!$inputError && $safeAggregateFunction && $safeAggregateFunction!="") #set($sanitizedValue = $safeAggregateFunction.replace('"', '').replace("'", "")) #if($sanitizedValue != $safeAggregateFunction) #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.invalidQuotes")) #else #set($safeAggregateFunction = $sanitizedValue) #end #end #if(!$inputError && $safeOrderDirection && $safeOrderDirection!="") #set($sanitizedValue = $safeOrderDirection.replace('"', '').replace("'", "")) #if($sanitizedValue != $safeOrderDirection) #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.invalidQuotes")) #else #set($safeOrderDirection = $sanitizedValue) #end #end #if(!$inputError && $safeFunction && $safeFunction!="") #set($safeFunctionNormalized = $safeFunction.toLowerCase().replace(" ", "")) #if(!$safeFunctionNormalized.matches("^(year|month|day|dayofmonth|dayofweek|dayofyear|week|hour|minute|second)$") && !$safeFunctionNormalized.matches("^(year|month|day|dayofmonth|dayofweek|dayofyear|week|hour|minute|second)\\((prop\\.value|doc\\.[A-Za-z0-9_]+)\\)$")) #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.invalidFunction")) #else #set($safeFunction = $safeFunctionNormalized) #end #end #if(!$inputError && !$safeType.matches("^(pie|bar|bar3D|line)$")) #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.invalidType")) #end #if(!$inputError && $safeOrderDirection && $safeOrderDirection!="" && !$safeOrderDirection.matches("^(asc|desc)$")) #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.invalidDirection")) #end #if(!$inputError && $safeAggregateFunction && $safeAggregateFunction!="" && !$safeAggregateFunction.matches("^(count|sum|avg|min|max)$")) #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.invalidAggregateFunction")) #end #set($hasSourceSelection = false) #if(($safeAppName && $safeAppName!="") || ($safeClassName && $safeClassName!="")) #set($hasSourceSelection = true) #end #set($appDoc = $null) #set($className = "") #set($classDoc = $null) #if($hasSourceSelection && !$inputError) #if($safeAppName && $safeAppName!="") #set($appDoc = $xwiki.getDocument($safeAppName)) #if($appDoc.isNew() && !$safeAppName.endsWith(".WebHome")) #set($appHomeDoc = $xwiki.getDocument("${safeAppName}.WebHome")) #if(!$appHomeDoc.isNew()) #set($appDoc = $appHomeDoc) #end #end #set($appDocRef = $services.model.resolveDocument($appDoc.fullName)) #set($canViewApp = $services.security.authorization.hasAccess('view', $currentUserRef, $appDocRef)) #if(!$canViewApp) #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.appNotViewable")) #end #end #if(!$inputError) #if($safeClassName && $safeClassName!="") #set($className = $safeClassName) #else #set($className = $!appDoc.getValue("class")) #end #end #if(!$inputError) #if(!$className || $className=="") #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.invalidClass")) #else #set($classDocRef = $services.model.resolveDocument($className)) #set($canViewClass = $services.security.authorization.hasAccess('view', $currentUserRef, $classDocRef)) #if(!$canViewClass) #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.classNotViewable")) #else #set($classDoc = $xwiki.getDocument($className).getxWikiClass()) #if(!$classDoc) #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.invalidClass")) #end #end #end #end #end #if(!$inputError && $safeProperty && $safeProperty!="" && $classDoc) #set($propertyIsAllowed = false) #foreach($prop in $classDoc.getProperties()) #if($safeProperty == $prop.name) #set($propertyIsAllowed = true) #end #end #if(!$propertyIsAllowed) #set($inputError = $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.error.invalidProperty")) #end #end #if($inputError && $inputError!="") {{error}}$inputError{{/error}} #end #if($hasSourceSelection && $classDoc) {{html}}
$services.localization.render("awm.statistics.field")
$services.localization.render("awm.statistics.type")
$services.localization.render("awm.statistics.function")
$services.localization.render("awm.statistics.aggregate")
$services.localization.render("awm.statistics.aggregateFunction")
#if($safeAppName) #end #if($safeClassName) #end
{{/html}} #if($safeProperty && $safeProperty!="" && !$inputError) {{awmchart type="${safeType}" #if($safeAppName)app="${appDoc.space}"#end #if($safeClassName)className="${className}"#end category="${safeProperty}" #if($safeFunction && $safeFunction!="")function="$!{safeFunction}"#end #if($safeAggregate && $safeAggregate!="")aggregate="$!{safeAggregate}"#end #if($safeAggregateFunction && $safeAggregateFunction!="")aggregateFunction="$!{safeAggregateFunction}"#end #if($safeOrderDirection && $safeOrderDirection!="")orderDirection="${safeOrderDirection}"#end /}} $services.localization.render("awm.statistics.insert") {{{ {{awmchart type="${safeType}" #if($safeAppName)app="${appDoc.space}"#end #if($safeClassName)className="${className}"#end category="${safeProperty}" #if($safeFunction && $safeFunction!="")function="$!{safeFunction}"#end #if($safeAggregate && $safeAggregate!="")aggregate="$!{safeAggregate}"#end #if($safeAggregateFunction && $safeAggregateFunction!="")aggregateFunction="$!{safeAggregateFunction}"#end #if($safeOrderDirection && $safeOrderDirection!="")orderDirection="${safeOrderDirection}"#end /}} }}} #end #elseif($request.showClasses) #set($list = $xwiki.classList) {{html}}
$services.localization.render("awm.statistics.chooseclass")
{{/html}} #else #set($list = $services.query.xwql("from doc.object(AppWithinMinutes.LiveTableClass) as obj order by doc.title").execute()) {{html}}
$services.localization.render("awm.statistics.chooseapp")
{{/html}} [[$services.localization.render("awm.statistics.showclasses")>>||queryString="showClasses=1"]] #end {{/velocity}}
